# WISP.data

[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.16893167.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16893167)

`WISP.data` package is designed to store R functions for downloading,
performing quality control (QC), and visualizing data from the WISP
station.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`wisp_get_reflectance_data()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_get_reflectance_data.md)
  **\[stable\]** : Get data of reflectance (level2) from WISPstation for
  a specific date
- [`wisp_get_reflectance_multi_data()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_get_reflectance_multi_data.md)
  **\[stable\]** : Get data of reflectance (level2) from WISPstation for
  multiple dates
- [`wisp_qc_reflectance_data()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_qc_reflectance_data.md)
  **\[stable\]** : Quality Control (QC) for WISPstation reflectance data
- [`wisp_sr_reflectance_data()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_sr_reflectance_data.md)
  **\[stable\]** : SUNGLINT Removal (SR) for WISPstation reflectance
  data
- [`wisp_plot_reflectance_data()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_plot_reflectance_data.md)
  **\[stable\]** : Create a plot of reflectance data
- [`wisp_plot_comparison()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_plot_comparison.md)
  **\[stable\]** : Comparison plot of Raw vs QC vs SR reflectance data
- [`wisp_trend_plot()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_trend_plot.md)
  **\[stable\]** : Creates a temporal trend plot of one or more water
  quality parameters
- [`wisp_runApp()`](https://github.com/oggioniale/WISP.data/reference/wisp_runApp.md)
  **\[experimental\]** : Run shiny app for get and visualize WISP data
